🎓

Teaching

Selected undergraduate and graduate courses with brief descriptions, instructors, and offering unit.

Spring 2025
Operating Systems
Jinpeng Chen
School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)
Principles + implementation: process/thread model, scheduling and synchronization, virtual memory and paging, I/O and filesystem. A series of labs guide students to understand key OS mechanisms from the ground up.
ProcessesThreadsMemoryFilesystemSynchronization
Fall 2024
Cloud Computing
Jinpeng Chen
School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)
Core technologies and hands-on engineering for cloud platforms: virtualization and containers, cloud-native architecture, microservices and service mesh, and Kubernetes-based deployment/operations with practical labs and a course project.
Distributed SystemsVirtualizationContainersCloud-Native
Fall 2024 Grad
Frontiers in Cross-Media Recommender Systems
Jinpeng Chen
School of Computer Science (National Model Software College)
Multimodal representation learning and sequential recommendation: alignment of image/text/time, preference-aware causal intervention, robustness via data augmentation, and paper-to-practice reproduction with open-source toolchains.
MultimodalSequential RecCausal InterventionData Augmentation
Spring 2025 Grad
Foundations and Applications of Large Language Models
Jinpeng Chen, Zhenye Yang, Fan Zhang
Academic Affairs Office
End-to-end LLM pipeline: pretraining/finetuning, alignment and evaluation, parameter-efficient tuning and compression for deployment, and multi-agent collaboration. The course project delivers a working demo from data to application.
LLMPEFTModel CompressionMulti-AgentDeployment
© 2026 Prof. Jinpeng Chen
